item.title: Preview Pop-Up Lunch at the Kitchen - 05/27/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/01/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come out to the Community Kitchen next Wednesday for our Pop-Up Preview Lunch. We will be hosting Pop-Up Lunch every Monday and Wednesday at the Kitchen starting June 1st from 11am-1pm. https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/eatlikethelocals?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZbATLWC2EamiYB1IfWxhMNEcPOdX9B50ar8L9wSuHxLXqjVfGK-nY6ryCTpJS8CrDAVIVf4xYAzotr-i5Ncyz1ery5-idib6OHZhmliR-Uw3UdnRY0q6JRvI2623Hrn-8lvffJ4naMyxNwpi1nko2pm&__tn__=q
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Preview Pop-Up Lunch at the Kitchen on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include pop-up lunch and preview lunch.

item.title: 12a | Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase - 06/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/01/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 12a | Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin-seneca public library and Kids & Family.

item.title: Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase - 06/01/2026 9:30am EDT to 06/01/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to make a folded book vase beginning Monday, June 1. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to make the vase will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/junemakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and virtual craft series.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/01/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St b, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Track your progress along the way (details coming soon!) • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657 Stay Tuned: More details—including how to play, prizes, and participating locations—will be announced soon!
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and local businesses.

item.title: Backpackin’ Babies—Turtles - 06/01/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA For ages birth to 18 months.  Babies need the great outdoors as much as older youth and adults do.  They need the exposure to fresh air, new environments and learn more than we think.  Spend some time on the trail as we learn about the turtles found in this area.  Come in a front pack, backpack, stroller or just walk.  Bring a blanket to sit on. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Backpackin’ Babies—Turtles on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include backpackin’ babies and birth to 18 months.

item.title: Class I: Growing Basil - 06/01/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Learn how to successfully grow basil from plant to thriving herb garden. Tips for site selection (indoors & outdoors) Soil basics & watering needs Ongoing basil plant maintenance How to keep basil full, healthy & productive
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Class I: Growing Basil on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include indoor gardening and outdoor gardening.

item.title: Laundry Day - 06/02/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/02/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month at FNC Hope Community Center. Laundry Days, Tuesday June 2nd & 16th 9am-3pm Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25-60083268-laundry
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Laundry Day on Jun 2, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Health & Fitness and families.

item.title: Family Storytime - 06/02/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/02/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. “Family Storytime” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and more for the entire family. All ages are welcome and registration is not required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Storytime on Jun 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include stories songs rhymes games and summer reading program.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 06/02/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/02/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer a special summer edition of “Teen Tuesday” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Teens entering grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly hangout featuring games, snacks, crafts and more. Part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information, log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jun 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer edition and summer reading program.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 06/03/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/03/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, June 3, 10, 17, and 24 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on June 3, June 10, and June 17 with books, songs and lap bounces. On June 24, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jun 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Coffee Connect - 06/03/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/03/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come meet with the management of Your Legacy Federal Credit Union every first Wednesday of the month at 11AM. This is a chance for members to have a cup of coffee and come voice their concerns, praises, or just ask questions. Eligible Members of the community are welcome to learn more about the "Credit Union Difference" and find out how our 70+ year Seneca County institution can help you with your current finances and future plans!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Coffee Connect on Jun 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Business and community.

item.title: Intro to Junk Journaling - 06/03/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/03/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Intro to Junk Journaling” for teens entering grades six through twelve on Wednesday, June 3 from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Drop in and discover the art of junk journaling by creating aesthetic pages, memory spreads, and collages while learning beginner techniques and creative ideas. Teens are encouraged to bring a journal, and a limited number will be available while supplies last. Craft supplies will be provided. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Intro to Junk Journaling on Jun 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include craft supplies and junk journaling.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 06/03/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/03/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on Jun 3, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Religious and Kids & Family.

item.title: Farm to Table Baking - 06/03/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/03/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us on June 3rd for the Farm to Table Baking class, where you'll craft artisan herb rolls and a delightful stonefruit galette using fresh, seasonal ingredients. Perfect for bakers of all levels, this hands-on experience brings flavor and creativity to your kitchen!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farm to Table Baking on Jun 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include farm to table baking and hands-on experience.

item.title: Plant Swap - 06/04/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/09/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Community Plant Swap at the Library Calling all plant lovers, gardeners, and curious beginners! Join us for our upcoming Plant Swap at the library—a fun and welcoming way to share the joy of growing. June 4 – June 9; During regular library hours. Trade plants, cuttings, and seeds with fellow community members. No need to bring anything to participate. All ages welcome! If you plan to contribute, you’re welcome to bring your plants or seeds anytime during the event dates—earlier in the week means more people can browse and enjoy them! Seeds should be in an envelope or Ziploc bag. Cuttings should be in a container that can go home with the plant. And don’t forget to label everything clearly so fellow gardeners know what they’re taking home! No registration required—just stop by and dig in!
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Plant Swap on Jun 4, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include plant swap and plants seeds cuttings.

item.title: Roar & Explore: Dinosaur Adventures - 06/04/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/04/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer “Roar and Explore: Dinosaur Adventures” on Thursday, June 4 from 2:00 to 4:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. All ages are invited to join the Library for dinosaur activities and games. Drop in anytime or stay the whole time. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Roar & Explore: Dinosaur Adventures on Jun 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and Kids & Family.

item.title: Toddler Trot—Fishing Fun - 06/04/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/04/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA For ages 18 to 36 months.  Join Linda Rose as we try to catch some fish in the pond.  Fishing poles and bait provided or bring your own. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Toddler Trot—Fishing Fun on Jun 4, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include toddler trot and Kids & Family.

item.title: Open Houses for Affordable Homes in Tiffin - 06/04/2026 5:00pm EDT to 06/04/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 459 S Sandusky St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for our open houses at the newly constructed affordable homes on South Sandusky Street in Tiffin. All four homes will be open for browsing, giving attendees the opportunity to tour the homes and view the layouts, finishes, and features in person. Applications for the homes are closed, but all are welcome to attend and see the results of this project and the new homeownership opportunities it has created in our community. Open House Dates: Thursday, June 4 | 5:00–8:00 p.m. Friday, June 5 | 11:00 a.m.–2:00 p.m. Location: 459 S. Sandusky Street Tiffin, OH 44883 More information about the project is available at http://TiffinHomes.org/
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Open Houses for Affordable Homes in Tiffin on Jun 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community project and homeownership opportunities.

item.title: Taste of China - 06/04/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/04/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy the flavors of China
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of China on Jun 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and flavors of china.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/05/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/05/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Health & Fitness and Science & Tech.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/05/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/05/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Springfield
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include quality care and Health & Fitness.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/05/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/05/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Defiance Hospital
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Science & Tech and 3d technology.

item.title: Financial Fitness Friday - 06/05/2026 8:30am EDT to 06/05/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join our Financial Counselor Rusti Claydon for Financial Fitness Friday, a new monthly event for our membership for FREE walk-in assistance and education surrounding your financial concerns! The first Friday of each month, Rusti has cleared her schedule to allow for members of the credit union to stop in and ask questions about their situation, ask for insights into how we can assist and how to better utilize Your Legacy Federal Credit Union offerings to their benefit! Not a member? Rusti can get you started with just a $5 minimum initial share. See you there!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Financial Fitness Friday on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and your legacy federal credit union.

item.description: Location : 459 S Sandusky St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for our open houses at the newly constructed affordable homes on South Sandusky Street in Tiffin. All four homes will be open for browsing, giving attendees the opportunity to tour the homes and view the layouts, finishes, and features in person. Applications for the homes are closed, but all are welcome to attend and see the results of this project and the new homeownership opportunities it has created in our community. Open House Dates: Thursday, June 4 | 5:00–8:00 p.m. Friday, June 5 | 11:00 a.m.–2:00 p.m. Location: 459 S. Sandusky Street Tiffin, OH 44883 More information about the project is available at http://TiffinHomes.org/
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Open Houses for Affordable Homes in Tiffin on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include newly constructed and open houses.

item.title: Corner T Fun - 06/05/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/05/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on Jun 5, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including fun and new.

item.title: UWNCO Raise A Glass: Seneca - 06/05/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/05/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 114 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us in Seneca County for Raise A Glass! We're celebrating our donors, friends, and supporters with a series of open house appreciation events across the region. Join us at Aglet Brewing at 114 S Washington Street in Tiffin on Friday, June 5 from 4 to 6 pm; your first drink is on us! 2026 Raise A Glass June 4 | Marion Brewing Co., Marion | 4 to 6 pm June 5 | Aglet Brewing, Tiffin | 4 to 6 pm June 10 | Cote Winery, Mt. Gilead | 4 to 6 pm June 11 | Carey Brewing Station, Carey | 4 to 6 pm June 12 | Pub House 123, Galion | 4 to 6 pm Our 2026 Raise A Glass series is sponsored by Alluvial Private Wealth in Marion; Seneca County Edward Jones - Financial Advisors Elaine Daugherty, Chris Lee, Hannah Luhring, and Rachal Tate; and Edward Jones - Financial Advisors Dan Beach & Hilary Orians in Wyandot County.
item.dc:creator: United Way of North Central Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: UWNCO Raise A Glass: Seneca on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local breweries and open house appreciation.

item.title: Dissected / Axioma / Mo'ynoq / Valletta / Skin Sandwich - 06/05/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/05/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 136 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Dissected - Brutal Death Metal from Tiffin OH Axioma - Dark apocalyptic metal from Cleveland OH Mo'ynoq- Black metal from North Carolina Valletta - Black n roll from North Carolina Skin Sandwich - Guttural death metal from Tiffin OH 134 S Washington ST // Tiffin OH Under the Surface Records Doors @ 6:00 PM // Show @ 7:00PM Free show! Donations welcome.
item.dc:creator: Axioma
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dissected / Axioma / Mo'ynoq / Valletta / Skin Sandwich on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Music & Entertainment.

item.title: Nature Walk Bird Talk - 06/06/2026 8:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Spend the morning looking and listening to the sights and sounds of nature in the preserve as you walk the trails with Linda Rose. Binoculars helpful. This walk qualifies for the Walking Stick Program and lasts about 1 ¼ hour. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Nature Walk Bird Talk on Jun 6, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include bird talk and nature walk.

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 06/06/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's

item.title: 2026 Tiffin Flea Market - 06/06/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 100 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come join us for a fun weekend of shopping for your next treasure.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Tiffin Flea Market on Jun 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin flea market and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Honey" Saturday, June 6, 2026 9am-12pm #06062601 - 06/06/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of honey, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Wednesday, June 3. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Colored Pencil Honey" Saturday, June 6, 2026 9am-12pm #06062601 on Jun 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Arts.

item.title: GSH Mary Rose Golf Classic - 06/06/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 11072 West, 11072 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us June 6th for the 4th Annual Mary Rose Golf Classic! Registration at 8:15, tee off at 9:00. See flyer and registration form under discussion tab for all the details. This has been a great event the past three years and we are excited to do it again! Proceeds benefit the DayBreak SAIDO Learning Center at Good Shepherd Home. Register your team or be a sponsor today!
item.dc:creator: Good Shepherd Home
item.yodel:media_alt_text: GSH Mary Rose Golf Classic on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and golf classic.

item.title: Family Fun Event—Frogs and Toads - 06/06/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Join Linda Rose from 11AM-2PM in and around the ponds as we look for these “hoppy creatures.”    Learn about their life cycles, habitat requirements and much more.  Nets provided or bring your own. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Fun Event—Frogs and Toads on Jun 6, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include family fun event and frogs and toads.

item.title: Kids Quest- Explore the Museum! - 06/06/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 123 W North St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Calling all explorers! FREE Fostoria kids event! Come hunt for treasures, collect stamps, and win a prize at the Fostoria museum. Saturday, June 6 from 11-2. All ages- kids and kids at heart Can’t make it? No worries—come explore the museum every Saturday May-October from 11–2!
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Area Historical Society
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Kids Quest- Explore the Museum! on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and kids event.

item.title: Book signing - 06/06/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 110 E North St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG NEWS, FOSTORIA! We are beyond excited to welcome local author and longtime Fostoria resident Carole Rinehart to Boujee Community Thrift Store for a special BOOK SIGNING EVENT! Saturday, June 6th Noon – 2PM 110 E North St, Fostoria, Ohio Carole will be signing copies of her book: When the Troop Train Stopped in Fostoria A heartfelt collection of stories and poems connected to the history and spirit of Fostoria. If you love: Local history Supporting hometown talent Reading inspiring stories Meeting local authors Celebrating our community …then you do NOT want to miss this event! This is more than a book signing — it’s a chance to celebrate one of our own and connect with the stories that make Fostoria special. Come meet Carole Grab a signed copy Shop local while you’re here Share your favorite Fostoria memories with us! HELP US SPREAD THE WORD Comment “FOSTORIA” if you love supporting local authors Tag a friend who loves books or local history Share this post to help us pack the store!
item.dc:creator: Boujee Community Thrift Store
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Book signing on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include History & Museums and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | June 6, 2026 Experience - 06/06/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 2:15pm EDT
item.description: Location : 225 Atha Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG BOY 4014 IS COMING TO FOSTORIA Experience the legend as Union Pacific Big Boy No. 4014 rolls into Fostoria during its Coast-to-Coast Tour Eastern Leg celebrating America’s 250th anniversary! This once-in-a-lifetime event is expected to bring thousands of railroad fans, families, photographers, and visitors to Fostoria to witness the world’s largest operating steam locomotive in action. Saturday, June 6, 2026 Big Boy No. 4014 is expected to arrive near the Fostoria Iron Triangle Rail Park at approximately 2:00 PM and depart around 2:15 PM. Times may change due to rail traffic or other operating conditions. Visitors are encouraged to spend the day exploring Fostoria’s local restaurants, shops, attractions, and community experiences as we celebrate this historic moment together. More information, updates, local offers, and visitor details at: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Mark your calendars! Experience the Legend, Experience Fostoria.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | June 6, 2026 Experience on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include big boy 4014 and community experience.

item.title: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | June 6, 2026 Experience - 06/06/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 2:15pm EDT
item.description: Location : 225 Atha Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG BOY 4014 IS COMING TO FOSTORIA Experience the legend as Union Pacific Big Boy No. 4014 rolls into Fostoria during its Coast-to-Coast Tour Eastern Leg celebrating America’s 250th anniversary! This once-in-a-lifetime event is expected to bring thousands of railroad fans, families, photographers, and visitors to Fostoria to witness the world’s largest operating steam locomotive in action. Saturday, June 6, 2026 Big Boy No. 4014 is expected to arrive near the Fostoria Iron Triangle Rail Park at approximately 2:00 PM and depart around 2:15 PM. Times may change due to rail traffic or other operating conditions. Visitors are encouraged to spend the day exploring Fostoria’s local restaurants, shops, attractions, and community experiences as we celebrate this historic moment together. More information, updates, local offers, and visitor details at: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Mark your calendars! Experience the Legend, Experience Fostoria.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | June 6, 2026 Experience on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include photographers and railroad fans.

item.title: UNION PACIFIC BIG BOY IS COMING - 06/06/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 2:15pm EDT
item.description: Location : 128 W North St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG BOY IS COMING. Big Boy coming to Fostoria RailPark Saturday June 6 2026. Book your days off, reserve a motel room, Are you getting excited?
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Rail Preservation Society
item.yodel:media_alt_text: UNION PACIFIC BIG BOY IS COMING on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include motel room and railroad enthusiasts.

item.title: UNION PACIFIC BIG BOY 4014 - COMING TO FOSTORIA RAIL PARK!!! - 06/06/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 2:15pm EDT
item.description: Location : 538 S Poplar St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Big Boy Statistics! https://www.up.com/about-us/history/steam/big-boy-4014 1) Fostoria is expecting 20,000 or more people on June 6th which is more than the population of Fostoria. 2) Parking will be a premium and be prepared to part blocks away and have to walk into the park. 3) Arriving early might seem like a good idea, but people will be sleeping in their cars so don't expect to just drive into the park. 4) Traffic will be heavy so bring lots of patience and leave pets at home as no matter where you go you will have to wait. 5) Restaurants will be packed so maybe bring a lunch with you. 6) It will be a hurry up and wait day so let's make it a wonderful experience for everybody. 7) There are many crossings that are along the route so maybe going to one of them might be a better choice is large crowds is not your thing. Our friends at the Fostoria Rail Park are working HARD to navigate the success of this event. Visit their website for more details --> http://fostoriairontriangle.com/bigboy.htm
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Chamber of Commerce & Visitors Bureau
item.yodel:media_alt_text: UNION PACIFIC BIG BOY 4014 - COMING TO FOSTORIA RAIL PARK!!! on Jun 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and large crowds.

item.title: Corner T Fun - 06/06/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on Jun 6, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including social and Food & Drink.

item.title: Saturday Nights with Mimi - 06/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 138 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Saturday Nights with Mimi A New Monthly Piano Series at Empire Bistro Join us for the very first evening in our new live music series featuring the talented Mimi Lange Johnston on the piano! On Saturday, June 6th from 6–9 PM, settle in for an evening of live piano music, great food, cocktails, and a relaxed atmosphere in downtown Tiffin. Our kickoff event will feature beloved summer classics and timeless favorites — the perfect soundtrack to the unofficial start of the season following Memorial Day weekend. Whether you're joining us for dinner, drinks, or simply to enjoy the music, we invite you to make it a Saturday night tradition. Reservations are encouraged.
item.dc:creator: The Empire Bistro
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Saturday Nights with Mimi on Jun 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include cocktails and dinner.
